Start Your Journey
Careers at Innovation Cluster
Meaningful Work is Here

We’re trailblazers shaping a bold future for our community.

Our passionate team is dedicated to helping innovation-focused, entrepreneurs and startups thrive—driving economic growth and creating a stronger future for Ontario.

"Working at Innovation Cluster means being part of a team that truly believes in the power of entrepreneurship. We collaborate daily to support passionate founders, solve challenges, and make a real impact. It's inspiring to be in an environment where innovation thrives, and no two days are the same."

Zahra Shafiei, Director of Programs @ Innovation Cluster

Life at the Innovation Cluster

A strong culture is the foundation of our success. We foster a dynamic, supportive, and collaborative environment where team members are encouraged to think big, take initiative, and make a meaningful impact.

Joining our team means redefining the future of business and technology. We work with uncompromising integrity and authenticity, inspiring creativity and innovation.

Collaborative & Supportive

We work together to solve challenges and drive impact.

Fast-Paced & Agile

We embrace change, learning, and growth daily.

Purpose-Driven

We’re committed to empowering entrepreneurs and making a difference in our community.

Balanced & Flexible

We value work-life balance
